texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · CPT CO 2 removal plant to remove 90% & 45% of CO 2 from flue gas.
texts.text: CPT CO 2 removal plant to remove 90% & 45% of CO 2 from flue gas.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Single train required for each case:
texts.text: Single train required for each case:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -90% capture = 413 mptd Net electrical power = 10.4 MW
texts.text: -90% capture = 413 mptd Net electrical power = 10.4 MW

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -45% capture = 207 mtpd Net electrical power = 5.1 MW
texts.text: -45% capture = 207 mtpd Net electrical power = 5.1 MW

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Flue gas temperature not sufficient for waste heat recovery.
texts.text: Flue gas temperature not sufficient for waste heat recovery.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Design reflects latest CPT design thinking regarding flue gas dehydration and membrane configuration.
texts.text: Design reflects latest CPT design thinking regarding flue gas dehydration and membrane configuration.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · CO 2 purification and export using conventional ammonia refrigeration technology with standalone plant i.e. not integrated into the removal process.
texts.text: CO 2 purification and export using conventional ammonia refrigeration technology with standalone plant i.e. not integrated into the removal process.

texts.orig: · Approx. specific energy for all cases (Small variation since necessary to use a whole number of membranes):
